name: Gimme Lean Loaf
recipeIngredient: 14 ounce package of Gimme Lean, ground beef flavor
Eggbeaters or substitutes equivalent to one egg (for binding)
1 Tablespoon Worcestershire sauce or soy sauce
1/4 cup dehydrated onions (look in spice section of grocery store)
1/4 cup nonfat parmesan cheese (vegans can substitute nutritional yeast?)
1 teaspoon your favorite spice (I used an Italian Spice mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 14 ounce package of Gimme Lean, ground beef flavor with 1 cup rice or soy milk, eggbeaters or substitutes equivalent to one egg, 1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce or soy sauce, and 1 tablespoon horse radish.
2. In a separate bowl, combine 1 cup bread crumbs, 1/4 cup dehydrated onions, 1/4 cup dried parsley, 1/4 cup nonfat parmesan cheese (or nutritional yeast for vegans), 1 teaspoon your favorite spice, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Mix the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients using your hands until well combined.
4. Line a cookie sheet with foil and spray with Pam.
5. Form 1 large or 2 small loaves on the prepared cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour. The outside will brown better on a cookie sheet, forming a delicious crust.
7. If making two loaves, freeze one after 30 minutes of baking. When ready to eat, pop the frozen loaf into the oven and bake for an additional hour. It will taste like it was just made without needing to defrost first.
